event_comments: Reviewed newsletter canonicalization follow-up 2026-03-21 merged duplicate event a32e3893-97d0-58a7-ba89-b472fbedc558 ("N.A.D. Park, Bremerton. WIOL Relay. N on SR 304 from ferry to West SR3"). Reason: rollover duplicate. Notes: The November 1995 issue scheduled the Feb. 3 WIOL relay for 1996, not 1995, and the same event was later re-ingested from 1996-01.
